name: word-gacha-mockup
description: 초/중등 학생 영단어 학습 앱 모바일 목업. 캐릭터를 키우고 도감을 모으는 게임화 디자인.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:browser && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/state.test.js tests/quiz.test.js tests/vocab.test.js tests/dex.test.js tests/streak.test.js tests/me.test.js tests/creature.test.js tests/play.test.js tests/animate.test.js
scripts.test:ui: node tests/ui-interactions.spec.mjs && node tests/r1-alive.spec.mjs && node tests/r2-dex-playroom.spec.mjs && node tests/r3-animations.spec.mjs
